replies.msg: f5 時 load ajax 但係只出到ajax 個 part , 要 reload full page 唔用 js，點搞?

f5 時 load ajax 但係只出到ajax 個 part , 要 reload full page 唔用 js，點搞?

f5 / ctrl + r / command + r (on mac) 你係應該hijack唔到，browser點都係load full page㗎喎(唔經js)，所以唔明你問乜

兩頁
a.php include b.php
b.php is Ajax page
url localhost/b.php only load b.php
how to load a.php that include b.php?

唔可能
你自己整個refresh button

兩頁
a.php include b.php
b.php is Ajax page
url localhost/b.php only load b.php
how to load a.php that include b.php?

你明唔明咩叫AJAX？ AJAX原本已經係用Javascript，你用a.php去load b.php，如果係AJAX做，a.php一定有javascript去load b.php，你reload a.php嘅時候一定會reload javascript，b.php一定都會被a.php嘅javascript去load多次。
所以都係唔明你想問咩

係咪上次問history api果個？
history API 要搭埋mod rewrite 咁用

如果b.php只係用黎應付ajax request,無echo過任何野,
a.php include 'b.php';都無咩分別,唔會多印任何野

但你可以用 file_get_contents() 拎b.php既response
$response = file_get_contents('http://localhost/b.php');
再因應情況parse, fetch, echo $response
return response 得 ajax個 part ， full page 不能

慘，寫左10年web我都理解唔到樓主問緊d咩...

樓主可唔可以用完整句子講野

我見係PHP所以唔理

a.php include b.php
b.php is Ajax page
url localhost/b.php only load b.php
how to load a.php that include b.php?

你明唔明咩叫AJAX？ AJAX原本已經係用Javascript，你用a.php去load b.php，如果係AJAX做，a.php一定有javascript去load b.php，你reload a.php嘅時候一定會reload javascript，b.php一定都會被a.php嘅javascript去load多次。
所以都係唔明你想問咩


a.php 有張 form, login 左 b.php, 再 route a.php 正常會 redirect b.php
